title: Dubai suspends church masses during holy week until further notice amid rising security concerns
summary_full: Dubai's Catholic churches suspended all masses and parish activities starting April 3, 2026, due to heightened regional tensions and official safety directives. This unprecedented Holy Week closure urges worshippers to pray from home, with some services moving online while others are cancelled entirely, impacting major parishes like St. Mary's and St. Francis of Assisi.
